findings.criterion: Scenario expresses retrieval from localStorage and rendering of stored note content into note-main elements on page load

evidence.quote: When the Notes App webpage loads, it must retrieve all saved notes from localStorage and display them accordingly.
Given the localStorage contains notes with values "Note 1" and "Note 2"
Then the page should display a note with text "Note 1" in a div with data-testid "note-main"

findings.reasoning: The scenario provides the required precondition (localStorage contains notes), the triggering user action (opening the Notes App webpage), and explicit Then assertions that each stored note's content appears in a div with data-testid "note-main". These steps directly map to the behavior contract's observable that stored notes are displayed and their content is shown in the main display element. The scenario focuses on the content-display slice and therefore correctly covers the targeted contract.
